overview.description: The BNY Mellon Municipal Short Duration ETF (BKMS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is actively managed, seeking to maximize current income through investments in investment-grade, short-term US municipal bonds exempt from federal income tax. Security selection uses fundamental credit analysis and relative value assessments. BKMS was launched on Jan 12, 2026 and is issued by BNY Mellon.
